`docs/helix/02-design/harness-golden-integration.md` does not update the supported-harness TUI-only checklist for agent, codex, claude, gemini, opencode, and pi with named record/playback scenarios.
`internal/pty/session` and `internal/pty/terminal` have no shown implementation or tests in this diff, so AC2 cannot be accepted.
`internal/pty/cassette/types.go` only adds freshness/account fields; it does not prove deterministic version-1 event-driven record/replay, seq/t_ms behavior, raw offsets, manifests, replay modes, or schema evolution.

The capability matrix supported/pass gate is not implemented or updated; only evidence fields are documented and stamped.
No `go test ./...` output, replay integration output, or Docker/authenticated record command documentation with skip/fail behavior is included.
